section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using JobAgent, you agree to be bound by these terms of service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

section2.title: 2. Use License
section2.content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on JobAgent for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not modify or copy the materials.

section3.title: 3. Disclaimer
section3.content: The materials on JobAgent are provided 'as is'. JobAgent makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties, including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability.

section4.title: 4. Limitations of Liability
section4.content: In no event shall JobAgent or its suppliers be liable for any damages that arise from the use or inability to use the materials on JobAgent, even if JobAgent has been notified of the possibility of such damages.

section5.title: 5. Privacy
section5.content: Your privacy is important to us. It is JobAgent's policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect on the JobAgent site.
